## Maintainer absorption review

This review state is maintainer-only and not governed lifecycle truth.

Allowed maintainer decisions: `ignore`, `defer`, `absorb_partial`, `absorb_full`, `reject`.

If a refresh candidate is present, `last_absorption_decision` remains unset
until a maintainer records an actual review outcome.
